basicInfo.name: Nightmare Aquila
basicInfo.flavor: Aquila is the last half-demon in the Holy Cross Crusaders and taught most of its members. She escaped Bai Jiao's trap with the help of the Night Crows, but went into hibernation from her injuries.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Merciless Storm
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 40% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 2 Allies with Lowest Current HP
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 90% of the caster's Physical Attack. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 40% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Shroud of Darkness
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Link. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Shepherd of Darkness
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Death Immunity. [Always Active]
 - Heals HP equal to 10% of the caster's Max HP when HP falls to 50% or lower. [3 Time(s) per Battle]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Effect Resist Boost to 40%.

profile.story:
Long before it was unified by Kris, Purgatory was a brutal battlefield where demons and the Human Alliance clashed.
However, when the archdemon commander of the demon army fell in love with an elven representative of the Human Alliance, it lead to an unprecedented era of coexistence between the humans and demons. And it was from this union of the archdemon and the elf that Aquila was born.
But peace did not last long.
Aquila's father was murdered by demons who rejected coexistence with humans, and her mother went tragically missing.
Determined to avenge her parents, Aquila chose to fight alongside the Human Alliance.
Thanks to her efforts, the Human Alliance won the war... but the fighting left much of Purgatory's lands polluted and uninhabitable for humans and elves alike.
Eventually, one by one, people abandoned Purgatory, and Aquila embarked on a journey to eradicate all of demonkind from the world.
To this aim, she founded the Holy Cross Crusaders, a group dedicated to finding half-demons like herself to hunt down other demons.
Before long, the Crusaders relocated to the continent of Aisha to continue their hunt.
